title: Implement CI validators (schema, provenance, min-cell, no-unsourced-number)
context: The dataset's integrity depends on automated gates that reject any record lacking provenance, below the minimum-cell-size floor, or carrying an unsourced number. This task implements those CI validators so every PR is checked automatically and reproducibly. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Implement CI validators that fail the build on schema-invalid records, missing/incomplete provenance, subgroup n below the documented floor, or any numeric value lacking a source_locator.
acceptanceCriteria: CI fails on: schema-invalid record, missing/incomplete provenance, any subgroup n below the documented floor, or any numeric value lacking a source_locator.
Validators run on every PR; documented and reproducible locally via pnpm.
Validators include test fixtures covering each failure mode and a passing example.
output: A committed CI workflow + validator scripts under the repo's tooling path, runnable locally via pnpm.
